name: stage2-rvv-segment2-generated-artifact-executable-boundary
title: Stage2 RVV segment2 generated-artifact executable boundary
description: Validate and close executable generated-artifact/runtime ABI evidence for the five provider-validated RVV segment2 forms without reintroducing direct route-entry, descriptor, route-id, artifact-name, script, or common EmitC authority.
creator: codex
notes: Validated the current selected-boundary generated-bundle and runtime ABI path for segment2_deinterleave_unit_store, segment2_interleave_unit_load, computed_masked_segment2_load_unit_store, computed_masked_segment2_store_unit_load, and computed_masked_segment2_update_unit_load. No production code repair was required. Dry-run and ssh rvv compile/run evidence passed for counts 0,1,16,23,257; direct pre-realized route-entry remained fail-closed; RVV provider preflight non-regression, target artifact export test, focused segment2 lit filter, git diff --check, authority scan, and check-tianchenrv 464/464 passed.
